about.title: About
about.description: Learn about Layouts by Lenny and our digital planners
about.heading: About Layouts by Lenny
about.intro: Creating beautiful digital planners designed with care.
about.story: Layouts by Lenny was founded with a simple mission: to create digital planners that are both beautiful and functional. We believe that planning your life should be an enjoyable experience, not a chore.
about.missionText: To help people organize their lives with thoughtfully designed digital planning tools that work seamlessly across devices.
about.qualityText: Every planner is meticulously crafted with attention to detail, ensuring optimal readability and ease of use in GoodNotes, Notability, and other note-taking apps.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.description: Terms and conditions for Layouts by Lenny products
terms.heading: Terms & Conditions

digital.title: Digital Products
digital.content: All products sold by Layouts by Lenny are digital downloads. Once purchased, you will receive access to download your files immediately.

license.title: License
license.content: Your purchase grants you a personal, non-transferable license to use the digital planner for personal use only. You may not redistribute, resell, or share your purchased files.

refunds.title: Refunds
refunds.content: Due to the digital nature of our products, all sales are final. If you experience technical issues with your download, please contact us and we will work to resolve the issue.

copyright.title: Copyright
copyright.content: All designs, layouts, and content are the intellectual property of Layouts by Lenny. Unauthorized reproduction or distribution is prohibited.

contact.title: Questions?
contact.content: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact us.

howToImport.title: How to Import
howToImport.description: Learn how to import your digital planner into GoodNotes, Noteshelf, and other apps
howToImport.heading: How to Import Your Planner
howToImport.intro: Follow these simple steps to start using your digital planner in your favorite note-taking app.

goodnotes.title: GoodNotes
goodnotes.step1: Download your planner PDF to your device
goodnotes.step2: Open GoodNotes and tap the + button to create a new document
goodnotes.step3: Select "Import" and choose your downloaded PDF file
goodnotes.step4: Your planner is ready to use! Tap any hyperlink to navigate between pages

noteshelf.title: Noteshelf
noteshelf.step1: Download your planner PDF to your device
noteshelf.step3: Select "Import PDF" and locate your planner file
noteshelf.step4: Open your imported planner and start planning!

notability.title: Notability
notability.step1: Download your planner PDF to your device
notability.step2: Open Notability and tap the import icon (arrow pointing down)
notability.step3: Choose your PDF file from Files or your download location
notability.step4: Your planner will open with all hyperlinks working

tips.title: Tips for Best Experience
tips.tip1: Make sure to download the PDF to your device before importing
tips.tip2: Keep the original PDF file as a backup
tips.tip3: Use the hyperlinks to quickly navigate between sections
tips.tip4: Set your planner as a favorite for quick access

howToImport.needHelpText: If you're having trouble importing your planner, please contact us and we'll be happy to assist.

freeSample.title: Free Sample
freeSample.description: Download a free one-month sample of our digital planner. Try it before you buy!
freeSample.heading: Try Before You Buy
freeSample.intro: Download a free one-month sample planner to see the quality for yourself. Choose your preferred color theme and language, and get a PDF with daily, weekly, and monthly pages.
